data.content: Verified existing implementation branch foolery-67b5 / origin/foolery-67b5 for multi-model agent scan. The branch includes CLI wizard changes in scripts/agent-wizard.sh and scripts/setup.sh plus settings scan persistence and regression coverage in src/components/settings-agents-hooks.tsx, src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx, src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts, src/lib/__tests__/setup-settings-writer.test.ts, and the Copilot smoke scripts. Validation passed in the dedicated worktree: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
